title: PHP Proxy - Config Endpoint
description: Test the GET /index.php?config=1 endpoint to verify it returns PHP server URL and environment information. Should return JSON with phpServerUrl and environment fields. Should handle CORS properly.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php?config=1
Verify response status code is 200
Verify response Content-Type is application/json
Verify response contains phpServerUrl field
Verify response contains environment field
Verify phpServerUrl is either http://localhost:8000 (dev) or https://php.appointer.hu (production)

title: PHP Proxy - Organization Detection from Origin Header
description: Test that the PHP proxy correctly detects organization from Origin header. Should match wellness.hu domain to wellness organization configuration.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with Origin header set to https://wellness.hu
Verify response status code is 200 or 400 (depending on API key configuration)
Verify organization is detected correctly from Origin header

title: PHP Proxy - Organization Verification Success
description: Test the main organization verification endpoint. Should extract organization slug, retrieve API key, call backend API, and return organization data with redirectUrl.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with Origin header matching configured organization domain (e.g., https://wellness.hu)
Verify response status code is 200
Verify response contains success: true
Verify response contains organizationId field
Verify response contains organizationName field
Verify response contains organization field (slug)
Verify response contains redirectUrl field

title: PHP Proxy - CORS Preflight Request
description: Test that the PHP proxy handles CORS preflight (OPTIONS) requests correctly. Should return appropriate CORS headers.

steps.description: Send OPTIONS request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with Origin header
Verify response status code is 200
Verify Access-Control-Allow-Origin header is present
Verify Access-Control-Allow-Methods header is present

title: PHP Proxy - Error Handling - Organization Not Found
description: Test error handling when organization cannot be determined from domain. Should return 400 status with appropriate error message.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with Origin header set to unknown domain (e.g., https://unknown-domain.com)
Verify response status code is 400
Verify response contains success: false
Verify response contains error message about unable to determine organization

title: PHP Proxy - Error Handling - Missing Organization Config
description: Test error handling when no organization configurations are found in environment. Should return 500 status with error message.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php (assuming no org configs in env)
If no configs exist, verify response status code is 500
Verify response contains success: false
Verify response contains error message about missing organization configurations

title: PHP Proxy - Slug Override for Localhost
description: Test that slug override via ?slug= parameter works for localhost testing. Should allow specifying organization slug directly when accessing from localhost.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php?slug=wellness with Origin header set to http://localhost:5500
Verify organization slug override is accepted for localhost
Verify organization is detected using the slug parameter

title: PHP Proxy - Session Management
description: Test that PHP sessions are properly managed after successful organization verification. Should store validated organization data in session.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with valid organization Origin header and receive session cookie
Verify Set-Cookie header is present in response
Verify session cookie contains PHPSESSID
Send subsequent request with session cookie
Verify session data persists across requests

title: PHP Proxy - Domain Normalization
description: Test that domain normalization works correctly. Should handle www. prefix differences and normalize domains properly.

steps.description: Send GET request with Origin header containing www. prefix (e.g., https://www.wellness.hu)
Verify domain is normalized correctly (www. prefix handled)
Verify organization is matched correctly despite www. prefix difference

title: PHP Proxy - API Verification Failure
description: Test error handling when backend API verification fails. Should return appropriate error status and message.

steps.description: Send GET request to http://localhost:8000/index.php with valid organization but invalid API key (or backend API unavailable)
Verify response status code is 500 or appropriate error code
Verify response contains success: false
Verify response contains error message about verification failure
